title: Copy calldata slice to memory then hash — avoids abi.decode allocation
description: abi.decode(data, (bytes)) allocates memory and copies. For hashing only, calldatacopy directly to free memory then keccak256 is cheaper — no ABI overhead, no length prefix handling, one copy instead of two.
when_to_apply: Hashing bytes calldata when only the hash is needed, not the decoded value
when_not_to_apply: When the bytes content also needs to be read or forwarded
